title: Petra
html:
Petra

The Jordan-leg signature finesse of Yahir's 2023 Egypt→Jordan trip. Yahir and Emilio went off the marked path here and had to scale a mountain on the way down (retrospective gloss). A direct lineal heir of the Machu Picchu off-trail walk (2021) — same finesse-the-route move, different geography.

Chronology

  • 2023-08-14 — 2023 08 14 Route from Cairo to Jordan — route planning, Cairo→Petra logistics
  • 2023-09-05 — 2023 09 05 todo 82423 — pre-trip todo
  • 2023-09-06 — 2023 09 06 egypt jordan itinerary / 2023 09 06 egypt jordan jerusalem itinerary — full itinerary
  • 2023-09-10 — 2023 09 10 this current momentjourney throu jordan has be thinking inte — mid-trip reflection in Jordan
  • 2024-03-02 — 2024 03 02 Questlist — added to the questlist
  • 2024-08-14 — 2024 08 14 travel occurrences — retrospective gloss naming the off-trail mountain scramble

Why it matters

Petra is the second-instance proof that the machu picchu finesse wasn't a one-off — Yahir does it again, with a witness (emilio), in a different country, two years later. The pattern is: find the official route, refuse it, take the harder way, scramble out alive. After Petra, this becomes Yahir's recognized travel-DNA, carrying forward to Annapurna Base Camp (2024) and the on-the-ground Shanghai year.

Connections
